---
title: "gp_bic"
generated: true
description: "Per-element Bayesian information criterion `-2 l_R + k log N` for a GP / HGP fit (lower is better); see :func:`gp_aic` for the comparability caveat."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.gp`](../nitrix-stats-gp.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:gp_bic -->
```python
gp_bic(result: _ICResult) -> Float[Array, 'V']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:gp_bic -->
Per-element Bayesian information criterion `-2 l_R + k log N` for a GP /
HGP fit (lower is better); see :func:`gp_aic` for the comparability caveat.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:gp_bic -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `result` | `_ICResult` | — | — | — |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `V`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:gp_bic -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `V` | elements of a mass-univariate map — voxels, vertices, or fixels |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
